nodes.name: Church
nodes.description: A quiet place for prayer and reflection.

nodes.name: Town Square
nodes.description: The busy center of village life.

characters.name: Elena the Innkeeper
characters.personality: warm but strategic, trusts slowly, notices everything

characters.name: Brad the Barber
characters.personality: chatty, knows everyone's business, talks too much

characters.name: Viktor the Farmer
characters.personality: blunt, says exactly what he thinks, sometimes wrong

characters.name: Lev the Dockworker
characters.personality: quiet, says little, sees more than people think

characters.name: Nadia the Librarian
characters.personality: analytical, collects facts, slow to commit to a theory

characters.name: Piotr the Miller
characters.personality: conflict-averse, smooths things over, hates accusation

suspicions.reason: was at the market around the time Nadia the Librarian was killed

characters.name: Father Gregor
characters.personality: moralistic, suspects everyone, quotes scripture when nervous

contradictions.description: Piotr the Miller claimed to be at market but you saw them at tavern (Day 1, Chunk 3)
Lev the Dockworker claimed to be at church, but Brad the Barber saw them at cellar (Day 1, Chunk 4)

conversationLogs.response: I was at the tavern earlier.
I was at the market earlier. I saw Lev the Dockworker near the cellar. If you ask me, Lev the Dockworker disappeared during the commotion.
I was at the tavern earlier. I saw Nadia the Librarian near the market.
I was at the tavern earlier. I saw Nadia the Librarian near the market.
I was at the docks earlier. I saw Viktor the Farmer near the town square.
